name: Metro Transport LLC
owner_or_parent: likely affiliated with Kansas City Transportation Group / Carey Limousine (1300 Lydia Ave shared address)
districts_or_customers: No school district contracts identified; address 1300 Lydia Ave is shared by Kansas City Transportation Group and Carey Limousine of Kansas City (luxury chauffeured ground transport)
recent_news: No M&A or growth news found; D&B and Bloomberg list as a small KC-area transport LLC
website: kansascitylimousines.com (luxury limo brand at same address; affiliation unconfirmed)
fit_notes: Poor fit. Appears to be a limo/corporate ground transport entity, not a yellow school bus contractor. No evidence of school district contracts; 10 employees and luxury-transport co-location suggest this is not a Summit-relevant student transportation target.

name: Meister Special Care Transport
districts_or_customers: Wisconsin Medicaid/BadgerCare NEMT ecosystem (MTM, Modivcare brokers); no school district contracts identified
recent_news: FMCSA shows authority as inactive at one point; small, owner-operated Madison-area NEMT provider; no M&A activity found
fit_notes: Poor strategic fit. NEMT/ambulance-style special care transport, not a school-bus contractor. Could be tangential (some SPED routing) but lacks school district base; below Summit's typical tuck-in profile. Founder-led so theoretical succession angle exists.

name: CTC Logistics & Enterprise LLC
districts_or_customers: No school district contracts identified; BBB lists under Medical Transportation category
recent_news: Incorporated Aug 2019 in Ohio; A+ BBB rating but not accredited; no M&A or growth news
fit_notes: Poor fit. Small (~5 yrs old, ~14 employees) medical transportation LLC in Euclid OH, not a yellow-bus operator. Owner is too new to the business for typical succession dynamics. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: Ryder Student Transportation
owner_or_parent: First Student (EQT Infrastructure) - this Burnsville location is legacy Ryder/First Student facility
principals: Chuck Terry (local Manager); ultimate owner EQT Infrastructure via First Student Inc
districts_or_customers: Burnsville-area Twin Cities school district contracts via First Student
recent_news: Ryder sold school-bus division to FirstGroup in 1999 for $940M, rebranded First Student; FirstGroup sold First Student & First Transit to EQT Infrastructure for $4.6B in July 2021. Burnsville site at 3400 Hwy 13 W is confirmed as a First Student Inc location.
fit_notes: Not a target. This entry is the legacy Ryder branding at the 3400 Hwy 13 W Burnsville location, which today is a First Student Inc operating site under EQT Infrastructure ownership. Direct strategic competitor to Summit; not acquirable as a tuck-in.

name: Mission School Transportation
owner_or_parent: Student Transportation of America (STA) - acquired/joined STA family in 2014
principals: Carla Bruno (President, local); ultimate parent STA
districts_or_customers: Long Beach Unified School District (LBUSD) special education contract; Torrance Unified School District; LA-area private/charter schools. Drivers represented by Teamsters Local 572.
recent_news: Mission joined STA Family of Companies in 2014. LBUSD SPED bus driver strike reported in recent years over wages. FMCSA: 512 power units, 417 drivers, active intrastate carrier.
fit_notes: Not a target. Mission School Transportation is a subsidiary of Student Transportation of America (STA), a direct strategic competitor. Originally Atlantic Express's California operations, acquired into STA in 2014 (via School Wheels Direct). ~512 buses serving LBUSD SPED and other SoCal districts - not acquirable for Summit.
